title: miliusa microphylla
intro: Miliusa microphylla is a plant species in the Annonaceae family, commonly known as the small-leaved Miliusa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Miliusa microphylla include its potential to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat various respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are typically dried or made into teas, infusions, or decoctions to utilize its medicinal properties.
